## Tip submission

**Self-review (contributor):**
- [ ] I have read all existing tips in the relevant category
- [ ] My tip follows the 4-part template (Why & when / Example / How to apply / Pitfalls)
- [ ] My example is a real prompt or scenario, not a placeholder
- [ ] I have answered: what does this tip tell the reader to do that no existing tip tells them?

**Differentiation statement (required — PRs without this will not be reviewed):**
Most similar existing tips: [list tip headlines]
This tip differs because: [specific difference in insight or actionable guidance]

**Maintainer review:**
- [ ] Differentiation statement is accurate (named similar tips read and compared)
- [ ] Example is specific and concrete, not generic advice reworded
- [ ] Pitfalls names real failure modes, not obvious disclaimers
- [ ] Tip count updated in README header
